title: US Expansion Services — ELLIS PORTER
content:
## Immigration Strategies and Support for International Companies Expanding to the US
Ellis Porter’s US Expansion team helps international companies develop immigration legal strategies to set up and staff new business operations in the US market.
Our US Expansion immigration services include:
- E-2 Visas for New Offices
E-2 Visas for New Offices
- L-1A and L-1B Visas for New Offices
L-1A and L-1B Visas for New Offices
- Work permit strategies to support US staff expansion
Work permit strategies to support US staff expansion
- US immigration compliance consulting
US immigration compliance consulting

## Is your company considering expansion to the US?
Schedule a free consultation with a member of Ellis Porter’s US Expansion team to discuss available immigration legal strategies to support your US expansion plans.
